headline: Piper Sandler Raises Arista Networks (ANET) Price Target to $181 on AI Exposure
summary: Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) is one of the Best American AI Stocks to Buy Now. According to a report by TheFly on May 6, Piper Sandler raised its price target on Arista Networks to $181 from $175 and maintained an Overweight rating on the stock, citing the company’s AI exposure.
